_README: This is the ONLY file you edit to change site content. Change the text after the colons. Keep the quotes. Keep the commas. Do not touch build.js or the templates folder. After editing, commit and the site rebuilds itself.

brand.name: Luxury Leasing Academy
brand.tagline: Treat rentals like a real business, not a side hustle.

home.heroHeadline: Build a six-figure business renting luxury apartments
home.heroSub: No cold-calling for sales listings. No waiting months for a closing. Learn the system that turned leasing into $2.5M+ in commissions, and a career most agents don't know exists.
home.problemHeadline: of new agents quit within their first year.
home.problemBody: The ones who make it aren't smarter. They have a system, and they picked a market where the odds aren't stacked against them. While everyone fights over the same sales listings, luxury rentals sit there: high volume, high demand, almost zero competition.
home.finalSub: Every course. Weekly coaching. A community that closes.

club.heroHeadline:
Everything you need to build a six-figure rental business.
All in one place.
club.heroSub: All 9 courses. Weekly live coaching. A private community of agents who are actually putting in the work. This is the complete system, not another course you finish and forget.

ebook.heroHeadline: 9 secrets to earning big with luxury rentals, without selling a home
ebook.heroSub: Most agents spend a year figuring out what's in this book. You can read it in 30 minutes.

matty.heroHeadline: From behind the bar to 1,000+ luxury leases
matty.heroSub: Founder of Luxury Leasing Academy. Chicago born and built.
matty.finalHeadline: I built the roadmap I wish I had. It's yours now.

testimonials.quote: Testimonial copy drops in here. Specific result, specific timeframe.
